ops.text:
VERIFY LANE (independent recomputation, $0, no LLM). Verdict: CONFIRMED.

Method: (1) re-aggregated E26's own out/per_pair.jsonl → summary.json headline reproduced exactly. (2) INDEPENDENT from-source recompute off _base-20260719/dataset/dpo/train.parquet with my own pipeline (own tokenizers per spec, own normalized Levenshtein DP + rapidfuzz kernel, own bootstrap seed 1729/10k). Distance kernel self-validated: my pure-Python DP == rapidfuzz on 29 sampled pairs (15 smallest-d + evenly spaced), 0 mismatches. Per-pair cross-check: my from-source d vs E26 per_pair.jsonl maxdiff = 5.0e-7 (word), 5.0e-7 (ws), 5.0e-7 (char) — pure 6-decimal rounding, so E26's per_pair is a faithful function of the source parquet.

Recomputed headline (EXACT match to E26 summary.json): n_pairs=470. word small_edit_share(<0.20)=0.04894 (23/470), CI95 [0.02979, 0.06809]; mean 0.70045, median p50 0.76517, quantiles min/p5/p10/p25/p75/p90/p95/max = 0/0.24125/0.36482/0.57758/0.87958/0.94145/0.96344/0.99547; d0=7 (0.01489), <0.05=0.02766. Robustness (from-source, my pipeline): ws 0.03191 n15 CI[0.01702,0.04894]; char 0.04894 n23 CI[0.02979,0.07021]. qwen3 (0.04468 n21) verified by re-aggregation of E26 raw only — not recomputed from source in my lane (tokenizer download); corroborated by a parallel from-source lane. Category breakdown reproduced exactly (direction 7/121, unwanted_action 6/31, wrong_approach 6/211, incorrect_change 4/73). Side finding reproduced: 7 word-identical / 5 char-exact pairs.

Pre-registered criterion evaluated AS REGISTERED — no goalpost move: threshold small-edit <0.20 (as registered), PRIMARY=word regex \w+|[^\w\s] (as registered), decision bakeoff_warranted=(share>=0.30) under PRIMARY (as registered), bootstrap 10k/seed1729 (as registered). Result 4.89% << 30% ⇒ bakeoff_warranted=FALSE, SKIP DPOP — the pre-registered decision-function output, not a promoted verdict. E26 is not a PENDING-E15 arm; its binary gate output is in-scope. All four tokenizers and the CI upper bound (6.8%) sit far below the 30% gate; decision robust.

Artifacts: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/e26-verify/{verify2.py, out/verify_mine.json}. NOTE collision: an unrelated concurrent lane wrote out/verify_summary.json in this dir (different schema: train/test/combined/xcheck) — not mine; it independently corroborates (train d_word 0.04894 n23, test 1/48, all <30%) but my authoritative output is verify_mine.json.
